parts.text: Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 ID: 83225.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Home Page — Logo click from internal page redirects to homepage and verifies URL and title, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/stores, Step Expected: Page loads successfully Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click the London Drugs logo in the header, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for redirect to homepage, Step Expected: url() = https://www.londondrugs.com/ ID: 83226.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Home Page — Search with invalid term 'xyznotaproduct999' displays 'Nothing found!' message, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com, Step Expected: Page loads successfully Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Type non-existent search term 'xyznotaproduct999' in search input, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Press Enter to submit search, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Wait for no-results message, Step Expected: elementVisible(h2:text('Nothing found!')) = True ID: 83227.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Home Page — Search for 'vitamins' submits via Enter key and redirects to search results URL, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com, Step Expected: Page loads successfully Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Focus search input (click on it), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Type 'vitamins' in the search field, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Press Enter to submit search, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Wait for search results URL, Step Expected: url() = /search?text=vitamins ID: 83228.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Home Page — 'Select Your Store' header link navigates to Store Locator and 'Find All Stores by Province' link navigates to all-stores page, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com, Step Expected: Page loads successfully Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click 'Select Your Store' link in header, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for Store Locator page (URL: /stores), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Verify page heading 'Find a Store Near You' is visible, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Click 'Find All Stores by Province' link, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 6.0, Step Action: Wait for all stores page, Step Expected: url() = /stores ID: 83229.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Home Page — Mini cart icon opens cart panel and 'Proceed to Checkout' button navigates to cart page, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Click mini cart icon in header (precondition: at least 1 product in cart), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Wait for mini cart panel to open, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Click 'Proceed to Checkout' button, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Wait for cart page URL, Step Expected: url() = /cart ID: 83230.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Home Page — Hamburger button opens Mega Menu navigation panel with category links, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com, Step Expected: Page loads successfully Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click hamburger/mega menu button (aria-label: 'Opens Mega Menu'), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for mega menu to appear, Step Expected: elementVisible(button[aria-label='Opens Mega Menu']) = True ID: 83231.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Home Page — Header navigation links for Deals, Services, Flyers and Gift Registry have correct href URLs, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com, Step Expected: Page loads successfully Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Assert Deals and Events link exists with correct href (/category/deals-and-events/c/1027), Step Expected: Deals and Events link is present Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Assert Services link exists with correct href (/our-services), Step Expected: Services link is present Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Assert Flyers link exists with correct href (/flyer), Step Expected: Flyers link is present Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Assert Gift Registry link exists with correct href (/myaccount/wishlist#registry), Step Expected: Deals & Events link = True ID: 83232.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Home Page — Newsletter signup in footer accepts valid email and confirms submission via API response, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com, Step Expected: Page loads successfully Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Scroll to newsletter section in footer, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Enter valid email address in the email input (TEST_EMAIL env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Click 'SIGN UP' button, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Wait for newsletter subscription API response, Step Expected: Success message visible after signup = True ID: 83233.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: PLP — Applying first available filter on lipstick search triggers API call and reflects filter in URL, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/search?text=lipstick, Step Expected: Page loads with search results Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Wait for filter panel to load, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Apply first available filter option, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Wait for filtered results API response, Step Expected: URL reflects active filter = True ID: 83234.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: PLP — Selecting 'Price: Low to High' sort on vitamins search triggers API call and reflects sort in URL, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/search?text=vitamins, Step Expected: Page loads with search results

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Wait for sort control to load, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Select 'Price: Low to High' sorting option, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Wait for sorted results API response, Step Expected: URL reflects active sort = True ID: 83235.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: PDP — Second-level breadcrumb link on product detail page navigates back to the category listing page, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/search?text=vitamins, Step Expected: Page loads with results Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click first product card to open PDP, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for breadcrumb component to render, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Click second breadcrumb link (category level), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Wait for category page (PLP), Step Expected: Breadcrumbs visible on PDP = True ID: 83236.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: PDP — Price element is visible and formatted correctly on the first vitamins product detail page, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/search?text=vitamins, Step Expected: Search results load Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click first product card to open PDP, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for PDP URL (product detail pattern e.g. *-p/*), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Wait for price element to render, Step Expected: Price element is visible on PDP = True ID: 83237.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: PDP — Availability indicator is visible on product detail page for in-stock vitamins product, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/search?text=vitamins, Step Expected: Search results load Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click first product card to open PDP, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for availability indicator to load, Step Expected: Availability indicator is visible = True ID: 83238.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: PDP — Add to cart with In-Store Pickup using postal code V6B 1A1 increments mini cart counter, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/search?text=vitamins, Step Expected: Search results load

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click first product card to open PDP, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for fulfillment/delivery options to render, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Select In-Store Pickup option, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Wait for store search input if no store selected, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 6.0, Step Action: Enter postal code V6B 1A1 to find nearby store, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 7.0, Step Action: Press Enter to search for stores, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 8.0, Step Action: Select first available store from list, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 9.0, Step Action: Click 'Add to Cart' button, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 10.0, Step Action: Wait for cart confirmation, Step Expected: Mini cart button visible = True ID: 83239.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: PDP — Add to cart with Ship to Home option and postal code V6B 1A1 increments cart counter, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/search?text=vitamins, Step Expected: Search results load Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click first product card to open PDP, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for 'Ship to Home' option to render, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Select 'Ship to Home' delivery option, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Enter postal code V6B 1A1 for shipping availability, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 6.0, Step Action: Click 'Add to Cart' button, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 7.0, Step Action: Wait for add to cart confirmation, Step Expected: Cart counter incremented = True ID: 83240.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: PDP — Authenticated user clicks heart icon to add product to wishlist and API call confirms the action, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/search?text=vitamins (with auth session), Step Expected: Search results load Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click first product card to open PDP, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for wishlist/heart button on PDP, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Click heart/wishlist icon, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Wait for wishlist API response, Step Expected: Wishlist button shows active/filled state = active ID: 83241.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Cart — Switching delivery selector to Shipping option triggers cart update API call, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/cart (precondition: product in cart), Step Expected: Cart page loads Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Wait for delivery selector to load, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Select Shipping option, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Wait for cart update after delivery change, Step Expected: Delivery selector is present in cart = True ID: 83242.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Cart — Cart summary subtotal element is visible and displays a dollar amount, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/cart, Step Expected: Cart page loads

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Wait for cart summary/subtotal to load, Step Expected: Cart subtotal is visible = True ID: 83243.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: My Account — Signing in with valid email and password redirects user to My Account dashboard, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/myaccount/login, Step Expected: Login page loads Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Wait for email input field to be visible, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Enter registered email address (USER_EMAIL env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Enter password (USER_PASSWORD env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Click 'Sign In' button, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 6.0, Step Action: Wait for My Account redirect, Step Expected: Redirected to My Account after login = /myaccount ID: 83244.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: My Account — Filling address form with name, street, city and postal code saves new address in address book list, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/myaccount/address-book (with auth session), Step Expected: Address book page loads

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click 'Add New Address' button, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Fill first name (TEST_FIRSTNAME env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Fill last name (TEST_LASTNAME env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Fill street address (TEST_ADDRESS env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 6.0, Step Action: Fill city (TEST_CITY env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 7.0, Step Action: Fill postal code (TEST_POSTAL env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 8.0, Step Action: Click 'Save' to submit address form, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 9.0, Step Action: Wait for new address to appear in list, Step Expected: New address appears in address book = True ID: 83245.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Store Locator — Page loads with 'Find a Store Near You' heading and 'Find All Stores' link visible, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/stores, Step Expected: Page loads

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Verify 'Find a Store Near You' heading is visible, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Verify 'Find All Stores' link is visible, Step Expected: Store Locator heading visible = True ID: 83246.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Store Locator — 'Find All Stores by Province' link navigates to all-stores page and renders the store list, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/stores, Step Expected: Page loads Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click 'Find All Stores by Province' link, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for all stores page URL (/stores/all-stores), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Wait for store list to render, Step Expected: url() = /stores/all-stores ID: 83247.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: MyRegistry — MyRegistry button on PDP opens third-party iframe or modal (validate button existence only - BLOCKED), Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to any product detail page (PDP), Step Expected: PDP loads Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Locate the MyRegistry button on PDP, Step Expected: MyRegistry button exists on PDP

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: NOTE: Full automation BLOCKED - MyRegistry is a third-party integration rendered in an iframe. Do not attempt to automate inside the third-party iframe., Step Expected: Validate only that the MyRegistry button exists on PDP and triggers an iframe/modal ID: 83248.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Deals and Events — Selecting 'Vancouver' from city filter loads filtered deals and events via API, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/category/deals-and-events/c/1027, Step Expected: Deals and Events page loads Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Wait for city selector to load, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Select 'Vancouver' as city from selector, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Wait for filtered events to load, Step Expected: Events/deals visible after city selection = True ID: 83249.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Checkout — Guest checkout PayPal button is visible and clickable (full OAuth flow BLOCKED - third-party iframe), Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to checkout page (with product in cart), Step Expected: Checkout page loads Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Locate PayPal button on checkout, Step Expected: PayPal button is visible and clickable Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: NOTE: Full automation BLOCKED - PayPal payment flow is entirely in a third-party iframe/redirect. Cannot be automated directly., Step Expected: Validate only up to PayPal button visibility and click-through. Do not automate within PayPal OAuth flow.

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 ID: 83250.0, Work Item Type: Test Case, Title: Checkout — Guest completes full checkout with credit card via sandbox payment iframe and receives order confirmation page, Area Path: LD.com - Globant, Assigned To: Virginia Zambudio (On Behalf of London Drugs) <VZambudio@londondrugs.com>, State: Design Test Step: 1.0, Step Action: Navigate to https://www.londondrugs.com/cart (with product in cart), Step Expected: Cart page loads Test Step: 2.0, Step Action: Click 'Proceed to Checkout' button, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 3.0, Step Action: Wait for checkout page URL, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 4.0, Step Action: Click 'Continue as Guest', Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 5.0, Step Action: Enter guest email (GUEST_EMAIL env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 6.0, Step Action: Fill first name (TEST_FIRSTNAME env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 7.0, Step Action: Fill address (TEST_ADDRESS env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 8.0, Step Action: Fill postal code (TEST_POSTAL env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 9.0, Step Action: Select 'Credit Card' payment method, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully

Sheet: tmp63q8pwb8 Test Step: 10.0, Step Action: Fill card number inside payment iframe using sandbox card (TEST_CC_NUMBER env variable), Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 11.0, Step Action: Click 'Place Order' to submit, Step Expected: Verify step completes successfully Test Step: 12.0, Step Action: Wait for order confirmation page, Step Expected: Order confirmation page loaded = /order-confirmation
